server.name: syutain-beta-mcp
server.description: SYUTAINβ MCP Server — Bot capabilities as callable tools

tools.name: research_topic
tools.description: Research a topic using web search (Tavily). Returns summarized findings with sources.

depth.description: Search depth: 'basic' for quick results, 'deep' for thorough research

tools.name: analyze_trend
tools.description: Analyze whether a topic is trending. Detects untapped trends (popular in English but not yet in Japanese).

topic.description: Topic to analyze for trend status

tools.name: generate_content
tools.description: Generate content using two-stage refinement (local LLM draft → API polish). Supports articles, descriptions, and more.

topic.description: Topic or subject for content generation

tools.name: check_facts
tools.description: Fact-check claims in text using web search verification. Returns verification results with sources.

tools.name: monitor_system
tools.description: Get system health status for SYUTAINβ nodes (CPU, memory, disk, uptime).
